---
title: "Life Expectancy"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    theme: flatly
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(crosstalk)
library(plotly)
library(DT)

df <- read.table(text = "
Entity	Year	LifeExp
Americas	1770	34.8
Americas	1830	34.8
Americas	1850	35.1
Americas	1870	35.1
Americas	1900	41
Americas	1913	45.1
Americas	1950	56.5028
Americas	1951	56.9204
Americas	1952	57.402
Americas	1953	57.906
Americas	1954	58.6525
Americas	1955	58.9932
Americas	1956	59.3801
Americas	1957	59.6062
Americas	1958	60.0883
Americas	1959	60.5007
Americas	1960	60.7932
Americas	1961	61.2684
Americas	1962	61.4211
Americas	1963	61.5399
Americas	1964	61.9124
Americas	1965	62.1123
Americas	1966	62.3322
Americas	1967	62.67
Americas	1968	62.7056
Americas	1969	63.0295
Americas	1970	63.1495
Americas	1971	63.8157
Americas	1972	64.0001
Americas	1973	64.3473
Americas	1974	64.8219
Americas	1975	65.4098
Americas	1976	65.7058
Americas	1977	66.2896
Americas	1978	66.6343
Americas	1979	67.0668
Americas	1980	67.247
Americas	1981	67.6911
Americas	1982	68.0177
Americas	1983	68.4306
Americas	1984	68.7457
Americas	1985	68.8882
Americas	1986	69.3281
Americas	1987	69.6289
Americas	1988	69.8726
Americas	1989	70.2467
Americas	1990	70.5909
Americas	1991	70.8608
Americas	1992	71.146
Americas	1993	71.251
Americas	1994	71.5582
Americas	1995	71.8289
Americas	1996	72.1831
Americas	1997	72.5468
Americas	1998	72.7124
Americas	1999	72.981
Americas	2000	73.247
Americas	2001	73.4795
Americas	2002	73.758
Americas	2003	74.0244
Americas	2004	74.3916
Americas	2005	74.6213
Americas	2006	74.9224
Americas	2007	75.1515
Americas	2008	75.2986
Americas	2009	75.5602
Americas	2010	75.4472
Americas	2011	75.9343
Americas	2012	76.1301
Americas	2013	76.2643
Americas	2014	76.4082
Americas	2015	76.472
Americas	2016	76.4312
Americas	2017	76.5049
Americas	2018	76.6965
Americas	2019	76.857
Americas	2020	74.9717
Americas	2021	73.8796
Americas	2022	76.1444
Americas	2023	77.2922
Chile	1900	29
Chile	1902	32
Chile	1907	30.5
Chile	1910	30
Chile	1912	31.9
Chile	1917	32.2
Chile	1920	31
Chile	1922	31.6
Chile	1927	37
Chile	1930	35
Chile	1932	38.7
Chile	1937	39.1
Chile	1940	38
Chile	1942	44
Chile	1947	47.9
Chile	1950	53.1513
Chile	1951	53.5373
Chile	1952	53.929
Chile	1953	54.3125
Chile	1954	54.7141
Chile	1955	54.9278
Chile	1956	55.4818
Chile	1957	55.7734
Chile	1958	56.2881
Chile	1959	56.6425
Chile	1960	57.2163
Chile	1961	57.3091
Chile	1962	57.8108
Chile	1963	58.3487
Chile	1964	58.8118
Chile	1965	59.4726
Chile	1966	60.3733
Chile	1967	61.0536
Chile	1968	61.6798
Chile	1969	62.341
Chile	1970	62.6344
Chile	1971	63.0715
Chile	1972	63.717
Chile	1973	64.42
Chile	1974	65.0853
Chile	1975	66.0374
Chile	1976	66.8193
Chile	1977	67.5294
Chile	1978	68.0421
Chile	1979	68.8581
Chile	1980	69.4748
Chile	1981	69.8222
Chile	1982	70.291
Chile	1983	70.8302
Chile	1984	71.2153
Chile	1985	71.6153
Chile	1986	72.0606
Chile	1987	72.4662
Chile	1988	72.7881
Chile	1989	73.1876
Chile	1990	73.6752
Chile	1991	74.0824
Chile	1992	74.3673
Chile	1993	74.6793
Chile	1994	74.973
Chile	1995	75.2984
Chile	1996	75.5548
Chile	1997	75.8262
Chile	1998	76.3241
Chile	1999	76.7382
Chile	2000	77.1276
Chile	2001	77.5798
Chile	2002	77.8397
Chile	2003	77.8841
Chile	2004	78.2765
Chile	2005	78.4589
Chile	2006	78.5328
Chile	2007	78.6519
Chile	2008	78.7518
Chile	2009	78.8901
Chile	2010	79.0954
Chile	2011	79.2357
Chile	2012	79.2211
Chile	2013	79.5509
Chile	2014	79.7137
Chile	2015	80.0079
Chile	2016	80.2949
Chile	2017	80.6096
Chile	2018	80.5594
Chile	2019	80.3243
Chile	2020	79.3488
Chile	2021	78.8764
Chile	2022	79.1762
Chile	2023	81.1667
Europe	1770	34.3
Europe	1800	33.3
Europe	1820	35.6
Europe	1850	36.3
Europe	1870	36.2
Europe	1900	42.7
Europe	1913	46.8
Europe	1950	61.9599
Europe	1951	61.8892
Europe	1952	63.2871
Europe	1953	64.0541
Europe	1954	64.8764
Europe	1955	65.6481
Europe	1956	66.8002
Europe	1957	66.9821
Europe	1958	68.0391
Europe	1959	68.26
Europe	1960	68.7123
Europe	1961	69.171
Europe	1962	69.1437
Europe	1963	69.3934
Europe	1964	70.0254
Europe	1965	70.0373
Europe	1966	70.2353
Europe	1967	70.3162
Europe	1968	70.1489
Europe	1969	69.9561
Europe	1970	70.286
Europe	1971	70.4677
Europe	1972	70.6855
Europe	1973	70.7999
Europe	1974	70.9586
Europe	1975	70.872
Europe	1976	70.958
Europe	1977	71.1587
Europe	1978	71.1905
Europe	1979	71.2803
Europe	1980	71.3419
Europe	1981	71.5498
Europe	1982	71.8728
Europe	1983	71.8697
Europe	1984	72.0095
Europe	1985	72.2292
Europe	1986	72.8307
Europe	1987	73.08
Europe	1988	73.154
Europe	1989	73.2036
Europe	1990	73.1225
Europe	1991	73.0863
Europe	1992	72.7633
Europe	1993	72.1081
Europe	1994	72.0386
Europe	1995	72.1815
Europe	1996	72.7397
Europe	1997	73.2985
Europe	1998	73.555
Europe	1999	73.319
Europe	2000	73.4418
Europe	2001	73.6194
Europe	2002	73.6257
Europe	2003	73.6757
Europe	2004	74.1495
Europe	2005	74.2867
Europe	2006	74.9033
Europe	2007	75.3079
Europe	2008	75.6092
Europe	2009	76.0592
Europe	2010	76.2025
Europe	2011	76.8703
Europe	2012	77.0615
Europe	2013	77.4116
Europe	2014	77.6754
Europe	2015	77.7767
Europe	2016	78.1705
Europe	2017	78.4613
Europe	2018	78.5281
Europe	2019	78.7588
Europe	2020	77.6514
Europe	2021	77.0357
Europe	2022	78.1827
Europe	2023	79.0594
World	1770	28.5
World	1800	28.5
World	1820	29
World	1850	29.3
World	1870	29.7
World	1900	32
World	1913	34.1
World	1950	46.3944
World	1951	47.1259
World	1952	48.2183
World	1953	48.809
World	1954	49.6514
World	1955	50.2055
World	1956	50.7373
World	1957	51.0636
World	1958	51.6151
World	1959	49.5818
World	1960	47.8198
World	1961	50.3459
World	1962	53.2416
World	1963	53.7161
World	1964	54.2603
World	1965	53.9975
World	1966	54.5644
World	1967	55.0678
World	1968	55.6181
World	1969	55.9999
World	1970	56.2664
World	1971	56.0193
World	1972	57.2155
World	1973	57.6923
World	1974	58.0614
World	1975	58.2681
World	1976	58.5754
World	1977	59.1539
World	1978	59.5129
World	1979	60.1571
World	1980	60.502
World	1981	60.9187
World	1982	61.3435
World	1983	61.5211
World	1984	61.8663
World	1985	62.2092
World	1986	62.7297
World	1987	63.1809
World	1988	63.3672
World	1989	63.7817
World	1990	63.955
World	1991	64.0642
World	1992	64.2879
World	1993	64.4334
World	1994	64.2995
World	1995	64.8817
World	1996	65.1995
World	1997	65.5406
World	1998	65.7408
World	1999	66.0412
World	2000	66.4333
World	2001	66.7531
World	2002	67.068
World	2003	67.4015
World	2004	67.7449
World	2005	68.1405
World	2006	68.6137
World	2007	69.0316
World	2008	69.3017
World	2009	69.6812
World	2010	70.089
World	2011	70.4033
World	2012	70.824
World	2013	71.1417
World	2014	71.4038
World	2015	71.606
World	2016	71.8768
World	2017	72.067
World	2018	72.3885
World	2019	72.6093
World	2020	71.9166
World	2021	70.865
World	2022	72.6398
World	2023	73.1694
", header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

shared_df <- SharedData$new(df)
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Filter
```{r}
filter_checkbox("Entity", "Region", shared_df, ~Entity, inline = TRUE)
filter_slider("Year", "Year", shared_df, ~Year, step = 1, sep = "")
```

Row {data-height=600}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Life Expectancy Over Time
```{r}
plot_ly(shared_df,
        x = ~Year,
        y = ~LifeExp,
        color = ~Entity,
        type = "scatter",
        mode = "lines+markers",
        marker = list(size = 4),
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{fullData.name}</b><br>Year: %{x}<br>Life expectancy: %{y:.1f}<extra></extra>") %>%
  layout(
    yaxis = list(title = "Life expectancy (years)"),
    xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2)
  )
```

Row {data-height=300}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Data
```{r}
DT::datatable(shared_df$data(),
              colnames = c("Region", "Year", "Life Expectancy"),
              options = list(pageLength = 8, scrollX = TRUE),
              rownames = FALSE)
```
